summary: Iteration 29 — Testing 3 Admin Back-office integration points: PPT Branding, Timesheet 2-step workflow, MilestoneModal merge. All critical features verified working.

minor.issue: Returns 404 (health endpoint not defined at this path). Non-blocking as all other endpoints work correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: pptx_generator.py is 1269 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into slide-specific modules for maintainability.

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests pass, 1 skip due to PMO 403 on admin config — expected)

(3) PMO validation goes directly to validated (advanced_to_cp_reviewed=0). (4) MilestoneModal correctly shows 11 types for epic_lifecycle, 5 for epic_milestone, 3 for transversal — tenant merge logic working. Credentials: admin@altair.fr/Admin2026! (TENANT_ADMIN), cp@altair.fr/Altair2026! (PMO_USER).
